completed_tasks.name: Full suite validation, bug tracking, old spec cleanup
Fix broken waitForURL regex in 35 spec files
Phone banking investigation and BUG-01 tracking
Fix 43 E2E failures (88→45) via 5 parallel agents

remaining_tasks.name: Fix remaining 45 E2E failures
remaining_tasks.progress: 222→88→45 failures fixed across 6 debug rounds. 212 tests passing, 45 failing, 98 did not run, 8 skipped.

blockers.description: 45 E2E failures remain — 13 parallel-timing regressions, 19 long-tail single-failure specs, 13 small clusters
blockers.workaround: Many pass individually but fail under 4-worker parallelism. Cross-cutting auth timing fix in helpers.ts would solve many.

blockers.description: 3 manual DB fixes still not in Alembic migrations
blockers.workaround: Manager role, campaign index uniqueness, import_jobs.last_committed_row column

decisions.rationale: Saves ~144s of unnecessary sleep per full suite run

decisions.decision: Auth state caching — skip auth setup when tokens < 30 min old
decisions.rationale: Saves ~90s on re-runs by not re-authenticating

decisions.decision: API-based auth (#2) not feasible with ZITADEL v2.71.6
decisions.rationale: No password grant, no v2beta OIDC API, PATs are machine-user only
E2E test campaigns accumulate across runs, pushing seed campaign past page 1 of paginated /campaigns API

decisions.decision: Fix real a11y violations in source code
decisions.rationale: 3 CSS fixes for WCAG AA: destructive token contrast (4.31→5.0), nav text opacity removal, scrollable pre tabIndex

decisions.decision: Use page.route() instead of waitForRequest for ky fetch interception
decisions.rationale: Playwright postData() returns undefined for fetch API requests used by ky

decisions.decision: Add waitForAuth helper for parallel worker resilience
decisions.rationale: 4 parallel Playwright workers overwhelm OIDC config fetch, leaving pages on Loading... screen

next_action: Continue fixing remaining 45 E2E failures. Priority: (1) Add waitForAuth pattern to helpers.ts as cross-cutting fix for parallel timing — this alone could fix 13+ regressions, (2) Fix 19 single-failure long-tail specs the scattered-specs agent didn't finish, (3) Fix small clusters (tooltip 3, table-sort 3, signup 2, cross-cutting 2, campaign-settings 2), (4) Create Alembic migrations for 3 manual DB fixes.
context_notes: Phase 60 debug work reduced failures from 222→88→45 across 6 debug rounds in 3 sessions. This session used 5 parallel agents: a11y-specs (10 fixed), voter-verify (8 fixed), filter-import-sort (10 fixed), volunteer-specs (10 fixed), scattered-specs (stopped early, partial fixes). Key cross-cutting insight: auth initialization timing under 4 parallel Playwright workers is the #1 cause of regressions — specs pass individually but fail in full suite. The waitForAuth helper (poll for Loading... to disappear) is more reliable than networkidle under parallel load. The 45 remaining failures are: 13 parallel-timing regressions, 19 long-tail single-failure specs, 13 small clusters (3 tooltip, 3 sort, 2 signup, 2 cross-cutting, 2 campaign-settings, 1 overlap).
